Today is February 18, 2026. Venezuela's acting leader Delcy Rodríguez is navigating a complex relationship with the US administration. Following the detention of Nicolás Maduro, what specific volume of oil did Donald Trump announce that Caracas had agreed to deliver?
(A) 25 million barrels
(B) 30 million barrels
(C) 50 million barrels
(D) 60 million barrels
(E) 100 million barrels
explanation: The article states that "Trump announced that Caracas had agreed to deliver up to 50 million barrels of oil."
model_output:
The correct answer is:

<final_answer>  
(C)  
</final_answer>

Here’s a summary of how this number is known:

- Following the capture of Nicolás Maduro in early January 2026, Donald Trump announced that Venezuela’s interim authorities had agreed to turn over *between 30 and 50 million barrels* of "high-quality, sanctioned oil" to the United States. ([m.economictimes.com](https://m.economictimes.com/us/news/after-maduros-capture-trump-says-venezuela-will-deliver-up-to-50-million-barrels-of-sanctioned-oil-to-us-at-market-price/amp_articleshow/126384866.cms?utm_source=openai))  
- Multiple reports later simplified this range into a headline figure of *50 million barrels*. ([business-standard.com](https://www.business-standard.com/world-news/us-to-receive-30-50-million-barrels-of-venezuelan-oil-says-trump-126010700079_1.html/?utm_source=openai))  

So among your options, *(C) 50 million barrels* is closest and most accurate.

(D) 9 or 10 years old

Mikaela Shiffrin sustained the injuries described in option **(C) A puncture wound and muscle damage to her stomach** during her crash in Killington in December 2024.  

Here’s what the reporting confirmed:  
- She suffered a deep puncture wound on the right side of her abdomen plus *severe muscle trauma*, especially to her oblique muscles. ([espn.com](https://www.espn.com/olympics/skiing/story/_/id/42715234/mikaela-shiffrin-puncture-wound-abdomen-trauma-crash?utm_source=openai))  
- Medical scans showed *no damage to her bones, ligaments, or internal organs*. ([cpr.org](https://www.cpr.org/2024/12/02/mikaela-shiffrin-abdominal-injury-killington-crash/?utm_source=openai))  

So among the choices given, the correct one is (C).

<final_answer>  
(C)  
</final_answer>

model_output:
